children.name: SES-002: a captured access token must be rejected by the real API once its session has been logged out (got HTTP 200 instead of 401/403 — this access token is a stateless JWT still within its expiry window, and the API appears to accept it regardless of logout because there is no server-side revocation check) expected [true] but found [false]

SESSION-003 (known issue): the token encryption key is recoverable from the same localStorage as the ciphertext it protects, so the 'encryption' provides no real protection against XSS/malicious-script token theft. See this test's Javadoc. expected [false] but found [true]
